summary: Post-modularization full regression test completed. Backend: 30/30 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Login, dashboard, navigation, and Casos page all working correctly. All 22 router modules responding properly after the backend split from monolithic server.py.

minor.issue: Auth endpoints have aggressive rate limiting (5/min) which can cause 429 errors during rapid testing. This is expected security behavior, not a bug.

issues: 403 error on condominium modules fetch (non-blocking, defaults to all enabled)
GPS Error: GeolocationPositionError (expected when location permission denied)

critical_code_review_comments: All 22 router modules successfully extracted and working
Auth module: login, logout, refresh, me, change-password all functional
Profile module: get profile, update profile, directory all functional
Finanzas module: catalog, overview, unit accounts, payment settings all functional
Casos module: CRUD operations, comments, attachments all functional
Reservations module: list reservations and areas working
Notifications v2 module: list and unread count working
Admin module: user list with role-based access control working
Guard module: my-shift and history endpoints working
Multi-tenant isolation verified - resident sees only own condo data
Role-based access control verified - resident blocked from admin endpoints

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Login, dashboard, navigation, Casos page all verified

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full post-modularization regression test completed successfully. All 22 router modules verified working. Backend split from 22k-line monolithic server.py to modular architecture is stable. Test file test_post_modularization_regression.py covers all major modules with session-based token caching to avoid rate limits.

modules_tested.auth: PASSED - login, logout, refresh, me, change-password
modules_tested.profile: PASSED - get profile, update profile, directory
modules_tested.finanzas: PASSED - catalog, overview, unit accounts, payment settings, units
modules_tested.role_based_access: PASSED - resident blocked from admin endpoints

frontend_verified.login_page: PASSED - renders correctly with email/password fields
frontend_verified.login_flow: PASSED - navigates to /resident dashboard after login
frontend_verified.resident_dashboard: PASSED - shows Quick Actions (Casos, Finanzas, Documentos, Asamblea)
frontend_verified.casos_page: PASSED - lists 41 cases with proper badges and status
